---
title: "Taha Ziad"
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
![](profile.jpg){width=50% style="border-radius: 50%; margin-bottom: 15px;"}

[<i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> Resume](resume.pdf) &nbsp;|&nbsp; [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/tahaz) &nbsp;|&nbsp; [<i class="bi bi-headphones"></i> SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/ztaha) <br> [<i class="bi bi-camera"></i> VSCO](https://vsco.co/tahaziad/gallery) &nbsp;|&nbsp; [<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email](mailto:taha.ziad.business@gmail.com)

<br>

I like stats :)

<iframe width="100%" height="300" scrolling="no" frameborder="no" allow="autoplay; encrypted-media" src="https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=https%3A//api.soundcloud.com/tracks/soundcloud%253Atracks%253A2331639830&color=%23ff5500&auto_play=false&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false&show_teaser=true&visual=true"></iframe><div style="font-size: 10px; color: #cccccc;line-break: anywhere;word-break: normal;overflow: hidden;white-space: nowrap;text-overflow: ellipsis; font-family: Interstate,Lucida Grande,Lucida Sans Unicode,Lucida Sans,Garuda,Verdana,Tahoma,sans-serif;font-weight: 100;"><a href="https://soundcloud.com/ztaha" title="taha" target="_blank" style="color: #cccccc; text-decoration: none;">taha</a> · <a href="https://soundcloud.com/ztaha/train-track" title="Train Track" target="_blank" style="color: #cccccc; text-decoration: none;">Train Track</a></div>
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
<!-- Visual spacer between columns -->
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Hearthstone Balance
```{=html}
<iframe src="hearthstone-balance.html" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
:::

::::
